title: Bien Hoa, Dong Nai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bien Hoa, Dong Nai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bien Hoa is a city in Dong Nai with a population of 1,100,000. An industrial hub adjacent to Ho Chi Minh City, offering significantly lower housing costs while providing access to the economic opportunities of the greater metro area.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
